name: critic_uncited_inference_rejects
description: Synthesizer emits a claim with an empty source_ids list. The critic must REJECT the claim before the verifier's deterministic source_attribution rule would drop it — the critic's reason surfaces in the safe-refusal text so the UI can name 'the critic could not verify'.
what_bug_this_catches: If the critic's empty-source_ids check is removed (e.g., a refactor narrows the policy to only the dose-change branch), uncited inferential claims would slide past the critic and only get dropped by the deterministic verifier. The user-visible refusal language attributes the safety call to the critic — losing this case would silently re-attribute drops to the verifier.
